name: Openclaw DX
description: OpenClaw gateway diagnostic and troubleshooting skill. Covers 14+ documented failure modes: crash loops, stale locks, auth token expiry, invalid JSON configs, port conflicts, memory bloat, and more. 173 downloads in 6 days — highest usefulness score in this batch (9/10).
review: OpenClaw Dx has the highest usefulness score of this batch (9/10) — it would be a flagship catalog entry that OpenClaw users genuinely need. The concept and changelog quality both impress. However, a VirusTotal flag on the published package is a concern that the author must address by providing a source repository for audit.
notes: CONDITIONAL LISTING. Required: (1) VirusTotal flag (suspicious.vt_suspicious) — author @siraustin must provide GitHub source repo so flagged content can be audited. Very likely a false positive for a diagnostic tool (process-killing, port-checking, lock-file inspection routinely trip VT heuristics). (2) Version discrepancy: SKILL.md reports 1.4.0, ClawHub reports 1.5.1 — must sync. Listing published with conditions per score 6.6/10 ≥ 6.5 threshold. See GitHub Issue #294.

rocket_findings.note: Likely false positive for diagnostic skill; pending source audit
